title: Pyrex Cook & Go LunchBox Rectangular Coloured Airtight Lid 0.8 L Borosilicate Glass Oven, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe Made in France (Floral)
features: Glass storage box: Rectangular format (0.8L) with 100% airtight coloured lid ideal for transporting your meal safely.
MULTIPLE USES: Cook directly in this box designed for the oven, then add the airtight lid to take your lunch with ease!
SUPERIOR QUALITY: Made in France, our boxes are made of borosilicate glass, resistant to temperatures from -40°C to +350°C. The lids are BPA free.
SIMPLIFIED MAINTENANCE: Our containers and lids are dishwasher safe for effortless cleaning! The seal is removable for deep cleaning.
COLORFUL DESIGN: The lid is decorated with modern and elegant patterns, combining style and function, so you can take it anywhere with pride
description: THE LUNCHBOX TO TAKE ANYWHERE IN STYLE! Thanks to its 100% airtight rectangular format and its borosilicate glass base designed to withstand all the shocks of everyday life, this lunchbox is the ideal solution for transporting your meal safely. And the little extra? Its lid is decorated with modern and elegant patterns, combining style and functionality, to take anywhere with pride. Available in 0.8L capacity, it adapts to small or large hungers. All you have to do is reheat your homemade dish directly in the oven or microwave, but take care to remove the lid.

specifications_table.Special feature: ‎Air Tight, Dishwasher Safe, Dishwasher safe, Freezer safe, Microwave Safe, Microwave safe, Oven safe (without lid)
specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Wash in the dishwasher, use in the oven (without the lid), in the freezer and in the microwave. Clean by hand if necessary.
